title: elaphoglossum glabricaule
intro: Elaphoglossum glabricaule, also known as the smooth-leaved elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum glabricaule are believed to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be infused in hot water to make a tea, or it can be dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
